statement: In every magma, Equation 3985 (`x * y = (y * (z * w)) * z`) implies Equation 3277 (`x * x = y * (x * (z * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0954
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op z w)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op x (op z w)))
